mechanism_narrative: A rise in the housing market signals increased demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing market downturns are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market recoveries are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply chain, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply chain recoveries are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales signal increased demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in retail sales downturns are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the labor force participation rate signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market contractions are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP signal a weakening demand for goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in demand recoveries are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in industrial production signals a strengthening supply chain, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply chain contractions are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
